package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsSplitTwoIndexZeroCut() string {
    ruleID := "strings_split_two_index_zero_cut"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`strings.Split(...)[0]` when only the first segment is needed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
